definition: Geopolitical imperatives (defense spending rising to 2-3%+ GDP, CHIPS Act $280B, EU Chips Act EUR 43B, reshoring) create structural fiscal commitments that are not discretionary, providing a political economy explanation for why fiscal consolidation is unavailable.
evidence: NATO defense spending rising to 2-3%+ GDP
CHIPS Act $280B, EU Chips Act EUR 43B
Pair_3 debate questioned whether this is isolable from standard fiscal/inflation channels
May be better understood as explaining why fiscal consolidation is unavailable rather than as independent correlation driver
open_questions: Whether this constitutes an independent correlation driver or is subsumed by fiscal trajectory
Magnitude of impact relative to standard inflation and monetary channels
